privileged_info_summary: The task uses synthetic data seeded from seed_demodb.py. Target user john.smith@example.com exists in the database and stayed at The Plaza Hotel and Hotel Adlon Kempinski. However, no other profiles stayed at either of these hotels, making the co-stayer set empty. All metadata claims about expected restaurants are contradicted: The Ledbury, Joe Beef, Facil, and Peter Luger Steak House do not exist in the seeded database (which contains only 11 restaurants: Da Enzo al 29, Lorenz Adlon Esszimmer, Le Cinq, Sketch, Per Se, Narisawa, Quay Restaurant, Roberta Sudbrack, Tickets, Spondi, and Vinkeles). Similarly, the excluded restaurants La Pergola and Sukiyabashi Jiro do not exist in the database. The expected count of 4 recommendations contradicts the actual data (should be 0 due to no co-stayers). The expected_score of 1 is also contradicted (should be 0 with no co-stayers).
